basic_details.job_title: ANPCC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Computer Assistant, Field Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Computer Assistant, Junior Laboratory Assistant, Field Assistant
basic_details.short_information: Andaman & Nicobar Pollution Control Committee (ANPCC) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 5 Computer Assistant, Junior Laboratory Assistant, Field Assistant Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Computer Assistant: Maximum age 33 years. Junior Laboratory Assistant: Maximum age 32 years. Field Assistant: Maximum age 32 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Computer Engineering, 12th standard with Science stream, 10th standard
qualification.details: Computer Assistant: Diploma in Computer Engineering of 3 years duration from recognised University / Institution. Junior Laboratory Assistant: 12th standard with Science stream from recognized board. Field Assistant: 10th standard from recognised Board

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 44,000/- Per Month, Rs. 29,000/- Per Month, Rs. 27,000/- Per Month

selection_process: Shortlisting based on academic performance and marking scheme Trade Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ANPCC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ANPCC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the ANPCC recruitment is 18th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned department before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in ANPCC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the posts of Computer Assistant, Junior Laboratory Assistant, and Field Assistant in the Andaman & Nicobar Pollution Control Committee.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Computer Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Computer Assistant position, candidates must possess a Diploma in Computer Engineering of 3 years duration from a recognized University or Institution.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Laboratory Assistant post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Laboratory Assistant post is 32 years. Age relaxation rules may apply as per government guidelines.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Field Assistant position?
faq.answer: The Field Assistant post offers a monthly salary of Rs. 27,000/-. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for ANPCC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications for this recruitment drive are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their application in the prescribed format along with necessary documents.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these ANPCC posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their academic performance and a subsequent Trade Test.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for ANPCC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The posts advertised by the Andaman & Nicobar Pollution Control Committee are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. What is the address for sending the application via post?
faq.answer: While the primary application mode is email, the postal address mentioned is The Director, Department of Science & Technology, A & N Administration, Dolly Gunj, Sri Vijaya Puram, Pin-744103.
